response_text:
R7 SCORES (PATH TO 100 METHODOLOGY):
CDP Security: 83 | Auth: 80 | Evidence Chain: 72 | Recipe Engine: 79 | Extension Arch: 85 | Data/Secrets: 76 | Operational Security: 61
OVERALL: 77/100

ACHIEVABLE: 95/100 after engineering fixes
STRUCTURAL CEILING: 97/100 (root-compromise + unaudited protocol gap)

WHY 100 IS IMPOSSIBLE:
- Evidence Chain ceiling ~94: OS-level root attacker can recover HMAC key from keychain
- Operational Security ceiling ~96: Requires human processes (on-call, SLAs)
- Auth ceiling ~97: OAuth3 proprietary, not independently audited

PATH TO 100 (TOP 5 DELTAS):
Delta-1 (+39 pts on Cat7): Full operational security stack (Prometheus metrics, structured logs, alerting)
Delta-2 (+28 pts on Cat3): Evidence chain hardening (HMAC signing, chain verification endpoint)
Delta-3 (+24 pts on Cat6): Prompt redaction + secrets isolation + PII scrubbing
Delta-4 (+21 pts on Cat4): Recipe engine determinism (canonical action normalization + replay verification)
Delta-5 (+20 pts on Cat2): OAuth3 token lifecycle (revocation cache, scope narrowing, step-up auth)

VERDICT: NEEDS WORK (77/100 honest score, 95/100 achievable)
